summary: Comprehensive SEO Phase-1 verification: backend sitemap/robots endpoints (15 pytest cases) + frontend Helmet/JSON-LD/H1-H2/FAQ/footer/blog/redirect checks across homepage + 5 landing pages + blog index + 1 blog post. All assertions pass. Found and fixed one user-visible HTML-entity bug in the short-form-video-ideas-ai H1 (literal '&' rendered as text).

ui_bugs.issue: H1 string in /app/frontend/src/pages/landing/content.js contained literal '&' which React renders verbatim (not decoded) since it's a JS string, not JSX text. Fixed by replacing with '&'.

action_items: OPTIONAL a11y polish: CVFaq question buttons do not toggle aria-expanded on the trigger. Add aria-expanded={isOpen} and aria-controls on the button, plus role='region' on the answer panel — purely a11y/screen-reader, not a functional regression.

OPTIONAL: robots.txt Sitemap directive points to https://social-sync-ai-1.emergent.host/sitemap.xml (root). Spec mentioned /api/seo/sitemap.xml; either alias is acceptable for crawlers since /sitemap.xml is also exposed by CRA static + backend route, but consider adding a second 'Sitemap:' line for the /api/seo/sitemap.xml alias to be explicit.
INFO: 16 console 401 errors during page-load are pre-existing auth probes (unrelated to SEO work, also noted in iteration 3).
critical_code_review_comments: Schema strategy is clean: homepage emits a single application/ld+json containing an array of [Organization, SoftwareApplication, FAQPage] — fewer DOM nodes, same crawl value.

Each landing page correctly emits its own SoftwareApplication + FAQPage schema and a unique canonical pointing at the production host (https://social-sync-ai-1.emergent.host) — not the preview host. Good.
BlogPost renders Article schema and a 'Keep reading' section linking the other two posts (internal linking working).
/blog/<bad-slug> correctly client-side redirects to /blog (Navigate replace) — no 404 page needed since the SPA handles it.
Footer (CVFooter) cleanly lists all 5 landing pages under AI TOOLS column + /blog + /agents + /dashboard + /#pricing under COMPANY — internal-linking graph is solid for SEO juice flow.
Sitemap returned 11 <url> entries (1 home + 5 landings + 1 agents + 1 blog index + 3 posts) exactly as spec.
test_credentials: Not needed — all SEO routes are public.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend SEO endpoints live at /api/seo/sitemap.xml and /api/seo/robots.txt (and root /sitemap.xml, /robots.txt). Regression test file: /app/backend/tests/test_seo.py. Helmet writes title/meta/canonical/JSON-LD after ~1s — when asserting in Playwright, wait_for_load_state('networkidle') + 1500ms timeout. Static robots.txt and the backend /robots.txt are intentionally different (static is augmented with Cloudflare bot rules); both return 200.
rca of the issue:
Bug: literal '&' shown in /short-form-video-ideas-ai H1. RCA: the h1 was authored as a JS string literal in content.js (content object) and rendered via JSX expression `

{h1}

`. Unlike JSX text nodes (where the parser decodes HTML entities), JSX expression children are treated as plain strings and entities are NOT decoded. Mitigation: use the actual Unicode character ('&' or '—' etc.) directly in content.js strings, never HTML entities.
